title: Incident response operating model

review_policy.note: Per user instruction, full Claude review execution is skipped going forward and must not be counted as a valid review receipt.

tuw_evidence.title: Incident response runbook draft

commands.command: node - <<'NODE' ... count S1-S4 sections, alert mappings, lifecycle steps, post-incident fields, and pending decision markers ... NODE

Verify the incident runbook has S1-S4 severity sections
Launch TUW workbook ledger integrity check

notes: This is a runbook draft only; no monitoring channel, alert rule, SLA decision, named on-call assignment, tabletop exercise, simulated incident, or product state was created.

notes: This is a decision-input brief only. It intentionally does not update the launch decision register because owner evidence does not exist.
Named on-call slots remain placeholders pending LT-L1-W08 staffing approval.
The incident runbook placeholders remain in place until an owner-approved SLA decision exists.

tuw_evidence.title: incident runbook 탁상연습·모의 장애 1회 처리
tuw_evidence.objective: L6 완료 게이트의 '탁상연습 1회+모의 장애 1회 처리 기록'이 incident runbook에 대해 충족되고 W01 증거가 조립된다.
acceptance_criteria: 모의 장애 1건이 알림 실발화→runbook 절차→사후 리뷰까지 처리되고 타임스탬프 체인 기록
SLA 대비 실측 응답 시간 기재(SLA 이내 또는 초과 사유 기록)
발견 격차 전건 runbook 개정 반영(개정 diff 존재 또는 격차 0)

verification_contract.method: 수동검증 — 1. 탁상연습 진행·기록 2. staging 모의 장애 트리거·알림 수신 확인 3. runbook 절차 수행·사후 리뷰 작성 4. 기록 파일 존재 판정

tuw_evidence.blocked_reason: This TUW is represented for coverage only. Required deliverables and acceptance criteria remain blocked or pending until real evidence or owner-approved deferral coverage exists.
tuw_evidence.required_next_action: Provide real completion evidence for this TUW, or record valid owner-approved deferral coverage in docs/launch/launch-decision-register.md.
notes: No completion, production readiness, go-live approval, owner approval, or owner deferral is claimed by this coverage row.
Full Claude review remains waived by user instruction and is not valid review evidence.

blocked_claims: This record does not claim LT-L6-W01, LT-L6-W01-T01, or LT-L6-W01-T02 is complete.
This record does not open monitoring channels or prove alert delivery.
This record does not approve S1-S4 SLA values or assign named on-call staff.
This record does not create or update a launch decision register row.
This record does not perform a tabletop exercise or simulated incident.
This record does not count the user review waiver as a valid Claude review receipt.
